ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (Male/Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "annual_salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the customer */,
  "purchased" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has made a purchase (0/1) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., Young Adults, High-Income Earners) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_type" TEXT /* Type of segment (e.g., age-based, income-based) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the segment */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the segment */,
  "min_annual_salary" REAL /* Minimum annual salary for the segment */,
  "max_annual_salary" REAL /* Maximum annual salary for the segment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the segment record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the segment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment the customer belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_mapping_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_mapping_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchasing_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "behavior_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior (e.g., Frequent Buyer, Occasional Buyer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior */,
  "purchase_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of purchases for the behavior */,
  "average_purchase_amount" REAL /* Average amount of purchases for the behavior */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the behavior record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the behavior record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_behavior_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* ID of the behavior the customer exhibits */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_behavior_mapping_behavior_id FOREIGN KEY ("behavior_id") REFERENCES purchasing_behavior ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_behavior_mapping_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the campaign */,
  "target_segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target segment for the campaign */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the purchase */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchase_history_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchase_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who interacted with the company */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call, chat) */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the interaction (e.g., phone, email, chat) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, clustering) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to measure the model's performance (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the performance record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to measure the campaign's performance (e.g., conversion rate, return on investment) */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the performance record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)
